'''竏噐-sh-z-m''' ('''kayashzemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quilt|quilt]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-sh-z-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quilt|quilt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏噐-sh-z-m
|-
! Lemma
| kayashzemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyashzemoko|thiyashzemoko]] || [[word:jiyashzemoko|jiyashzemoko]] || [[word:shiyashzemoko|shiyashzemoko]] || [[word:kiyashzemoko|kiyashzemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyashzemoko|thuthuyashzemoko]] || [[word:jujuyashzemoko|jujuyashzemoko]] || [[word:shushuyashzemoko|shushuyashzemoko]] || [[word:kukuyashzemoko|kukuyashzemoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyashzemoko|thuyashzemoko]] || [[word:juyashzemoko|juyashzemoko]] || [[word:shuyashzemoko|shuyashzemoko]] || [[word:kuyashzemoko|kuyashzemoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyashzemoko|thoyashzemoko]] || [[word:joyashzemoko|joyashzemoko]] || [[word:shoyashzemoko|shoyashzemoko]] || [[word:koyashzemoko|koyashzemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦyashzemoko|thﾃｦyashzemoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦyashzemoko|jﾃｦyashzemoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦyashzemoko|shﾃｦyashzemoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦyashzemoko|kﾃｦyashzemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayashzemoko|thathayashzemoko]] || [[word:jajayashzemoko|jajayashzemoko]] || [[word:shashayashzemoko|shashayashzemoko]] || [[word:kakayashzemoko|kakayashzemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayashzemoko|thayashzemoko]] || [[word:jayashzemoko|jayashzemoko]] || [[word:shayashzemoko|shayashzemoko]] || [[word:kayashzemoko|kayashzemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayashzemoko|thayashzemoko]] || [[word:jayashzemoko|jayashzemoko]] || [[word:shayashzemoko|shayashzemoko]] || [[word:kayashzemoko|kayashzemoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
